en: Arm of the Hero.
A limb that lifts strength and carries out action
Producing results through effort and execution
If overexerted, physical depletion can increase
ko: 무리하면 체력적 소모가 커질 수 있음

en: Wing joint of Pegasus.
Caution, restrained ambition, and a planned approach
Preference for stable choices while avoiding excessive risk
Excessive passivity may result in missed opportunities
ko: 과도한 위험을 피하며 안정적인 선택을 선호
소극성이 지나치면 기회를 놓칠 수 있음

en: Center of the Galaxy.
Orientation toward large-scale meaning, distant horizons, and overarching frameworks
A tendency to connect personal experience with broader systems, beliefs, or collective context
If overextended, perspective may become too abstract, extreme, or detached from immediate reality
ko: 거대한 의미 체계, 먼 지평, 상위 질서를 향한 방향성
개인적 경험을 더 큰 체계, 신념, 집단적 맥락과 연결하려는 경향
이 성향이 과도해지면 시야가 지나치게 관념적이거나 극단적이 되어 현실 감각이 약해질 수 있음

en: Knee of the Herdsman.
Pioneering spirit, independence, and protective leadership
Practical ability and charisma to guide a group
Isolation or rigidity may deepen separation from others
ko: 고립되거나 독선에 빠질 경우 외부와의 단절이 심화될 수 있음

en: Heart of the Lion.
Kingship, fame, authority, and social prominence
Sustained success through nobility and generosity
Arrogance, vengeance, or moral decay can result in rapid decline
ko: 고결함과 관대함을 유지할 때 지속적인 성공
오만, 복수심, 도덕적 타락은 급격한 몰락을 부름

en: Wings of the Serpent.
An element that enables ascent and departure
Attempts to move beyond an existing state
If contact with reality weakens, instability can arise
ko: 현실과의 접점이 약해지면 불안정해질 수 있음

en: Arm of the Herdsman.
A limb that carries tools and performs action
Translating intention into actual movement
If overused, depletion can increase
Chest of the Queen.
A center where presence and self-worth are expressed
Heightened self-awareness and sense of role
If exposure increases, it can act as burden
ko: 노출이 커지면 부담으로 작용할 수 있음

en: Near the Scorpion’s stinger.
Concentrated danger and heightened sensitivity
Sharp perception that precisely identifies threats
Sustained tension may lead to anxiety or depletion
ko: 위협 요소를 정확히 짚어내는 날카로운 인식
긴장이 지속되면 불안이나 소모로 이어질 수 있음

en: Base of the Water Bearer.
Collective order, institutional protection
Stability that operates within structures and systems rather than the individual
The more one relies on structure, the more personal autonomy can weaken
ko: 개인보다 구조와 체계 속에서 작동하는 안정성
구조에 의존할수록 개인적 자율성은 약화될 수 있음

en: Knee of Atlas.
A role that supports and bears weight
Practically upholding responsibility or burden
If overloaded, endurance can weaken
ko: 과부하가 걸리면 지구력이 약화될 수 있음

en: Feather of the Eagle’s wing.
A sense for widening perspective and exploring direction
An attitude of surveying information or situations from above
Excessive distancing can weaken a sense of reality
ko: 거리 두기가 과해지면 현실 감각이 약해질 수 있음

en: Belt of the Hunter.
A point that binds strength and roles to maintain a center
Simultaneous demands for responsibility and execution
If balance falters, overload can occur
ko: 힘과 역할을 묶어 중심을 잡는 지점
균형이 흐트러지면 과부하가 생길 수 있음

en: Inner structure of the Ship.
A core space that sustains movement
Supporting function from an unseen position
If internal coordination falters, progress can slow
ko: 내부 조율이 어긋나면 진행이 늦어질 수 있음

en: Arrowhead of the Archer.
Goal orientation and far-reaching vision
Drive to move toward distant objectives
Fixation on ideals may complicate practical adjustment
ko: 멀리 있는 목적지를 향해 나아가는 추진력
이상에 집착하면 현실 조율이 어려워질 수 있음

en: Tip of the Little Bear’s tail.
Direction, a reference point, an unchanging axis
Guidance that keeps you from losing your way amid confusion
If you cling to fixed standards, flexibility can decrease
ko: 혼란 속에서도 길을 잃지 않게 하는 지침
고정된 기준에 집착하면 유연성이 줄어들 수 있음

en: Head of the Dragon.
Vigilance, surveillance, and guardianship of ancient knowledge
Attitude of holding position while anticipating danger
Excessive watchfulness may turn into mistrust or isolation
ko: 위험을 미리 인지하고 자리를 지키는 태도
과도한 경계심은 불신이나 고립으로 이어질 수 있음

en: Shoulder of the Charioteer.
Intellect, versatility, and broad public appeal
Ability to combine practical thinking with originality
If radical thinking lacks control, choices may become unstable
ko: 실용적 사고와 독창성을 동시에 활용하는 능력
사고의 급진성이 통제되지 않으면 불안정한 선택으로 나타날 수 있음

en: Shoulder of the Swan.
A point connecting wing and torso
Regulating between movement and stability
If balance falters, strain can be felt
ko: 균형이 흐트러지면 부담이 느껴질 수 있음

en: Torso of the Twins.
Inner joy, emotional warmth
Intimacy and stability felt within relationships
Remaining in emotion can slow practical judgment
ko: 감정에 머무르면 현실적 판단이 느려질 수 있음

en: Shaft of the Arrow.
The central structure that carries intention
Stable progression while direction is maintained
If focus wavers, the trajectory can become unstable
ko: 집중이 흐트러지면 궤도가 흔들릴 수 있음

en: Rim of the Cup.
A boundary where contents overflow or become visible
A point where emotions or resources are expressed outwardly
If regulation is insufficient, exposure can increase
ko: 조절이 부족하면 노출이 커질 수 있음

en: A winding point of the river.
A deep inner core where emotions or experiences are condensed
Maturation achieved through processes borne alone
Prolonged isolation can incline toward depression or withdrawal
ko: 고립이 길어지면 우울이나 침잠으로 기울 수 있음

en: Wing of the Crow.
The ability to read situations and seize opportunities
Use of language and information
If distorted, it may be perceived as distrust or scheming
ko: 왜곡되면 불신이나 책략으로 오해받을 수 있음

en: Eye of the Great Bear.
Perception of subtle differences and hidden factors
Awareness of variables or supporting roles that remain unseen
Overlooking small details may lead to errors in judgment
ko: 미묘한 차이, 숨겨진 요소에 대한 인식
겉으로 드러나지 않는 변수나 보조적 역할
사소한 것을 간과하면 판단 착오로 이어질 수 있음

en: Handle of the Water Bearer.
A point for holding and regulating contents
An attitude toward managing resources or information
If regulation weakens, losses can occur
ko: 조절이 약해지면 손실이 생길 수 있음

en: Waist of the Great Bear.
Cooperation, binary-style functioning, balance within relationships
Strength that comes alive more when together than alone
If dependency grows, autonomy can weaken
ko: 협력, 쌍성적 작동, 관계 속 균형
단독보다 함께할 때 힘이 살아나는 성향
의존성이 커지면 자율성이 약화될 수 있음

en: Knee of the Archer.
Foundation, starting point, stable footing
Securing an initial position in order to advance further
Without a solid base, progress can become unstable
ko: 멀리 나아가기 위한 초기 위치 확보
기반을 다지지 않으면 진전이 불안정해질 수 있음

en: Body of the Water Bearer.
The central vessel where contents are held
A state in which potential and resources are accumulated
If overfilled, it can be felt as burden
ko: 과도하게 채우면 부담으로 느껴질 수 있음

en: Tail of the Great Dog.
A function that assists movement and changes of direction
Adjusting responses according to changing circumstances
If consistency is lacking, it can become scattered
Joint of the Scorpion’s claw.
A point where the choice to grasp or release is made
Judgment of focus and separation operating simultaneously
If decisions are delayed, tension can persist
ko: 결정을 미루면 긴장이 지속될 수 있음

en: Belly of the Whale.
An inner space where power and emotion are accumulated
Motivations operating beneath the surface
If inner processing is delayed, it can remain as burden
ko: 내면 처리가 지연되면 부담으로 남을 수 있음

en: Arrowhead of the Archer.
Clear directional setting toward a target
A flow in which intention and action seek alignment
If rushed, it may leave no room for adjustment
ko: 성급하면 여지를 남기지 못할 수 있음

en: Face of the Archer.
Harsh realism and concentrated will
Attitude that prioritizes survival and results over ideals
Suppressing emotion for goal attainment may roughen human relationships
ko: 목표 달성을 위해 감정을 억누르면 인간관계가 거칠어질 수 있음

en: Tail of the Peacock.
The terminal point of outward expression
Expansion of visual impression and messaging
If excessive, it can be perceived as scattered
Knot connecting the two Fish.
Connection, branching point, and moment of choice
Junction where different currents converge
Delaying decision may amplify loss of direction or confusion
ko: 결단을 미루면 방향 상실이나 혼란이 커질 수 있음

en: Edge of the Crab’s shell.
A point where boundaries and defense are formed
An attitude of protecting oneself while assessing the situation
If excessive, it can appear closed-off
Crown above the head.
Dignity, restrained honor, and quiet recognition
Attitude that earns respect without drawing attention
Excessive modesty may diminish recognition of one’s own value
ko: 과도한 겸손은 자신의 가치를 스스로 축소시킬 수 있음

en: Feet of the Water Bearer.
Protection, support, survival safety net
Auxiliary strength that allows endurance even in danger
Reliance on safety can limit challenge or expansion
ko: 위험 속에서도 버틸 수 있게 하는 보조적 힘
안전에 의존하면 도전이나 확장이 제한될 수 있음

en: Chest of the Centaur.
Judgment and restrained authority
Ability to assess situations calmly and bring order
Excessive control may generate relational tension
ko: 과도한 통제는 관계적 긴장을 유발할 수 있음

en: Shoulder of the Eagle.
Concentrated force, clear sense of purpose
A tendency to gather energy at a single point to produce results
If vision narrows, surrounding circumstances may be overlooked
ko: 에너지를 한 지점에 모아 성과를 내는 경향
시야가 좁아지면 주변 상황을 놓칠 수 있음

en: Shoulder of Perseus.
A point that supports both burden and weaponry
Bearing responsibility in order to carry out a mission
If load becomes excessive, mobility can decline
ko: 하중이 커지면 기동성이 떨어질 수 있음

en: Side of the Cross.
Emotional sensitivity, consideration, and delicate devotion
Attitude of quickly sensing and responding to others’ needs
Cumulative emotional expenditure may lead to rapid fatigue
ko: 타인의 필요를 빠르게 감지하고 돕는 태도
감정 소모가 누적되면 쉽게 지칠 수 있음

en: Elbow of the Archer.
A joint where directional adjustment and aiming take place
Fine-tuning toward a target
If adjustments are too frequent, flow can be disrupted
ko: 조정이 잦으면 흐름이 끊길 수 있음

en: Foreleg of Pegasus.
A point of support preparing for a leap
A phase of gathering strength before initiating movement
If preparation is insufficient, propulsion can weaken
ko: 움직임을 시작하기 전 힘을 모으는 단계
준비가 부족하면 추진이 약해질 수 있음

en: Shoulder of the Archer.
Orientation and a reference point for judgment
Role of establishing criteria for choice within a situation
Rigid judgment may reduce flexibility
ko: 상황 속에서 선택의 기준을 잡는 역할
판단이 경직되면 융통성이 줄어들 수 있음

en: Claw of the Crab.
Protective instinct and survival awareness within a group
Disposition to defend others or secure surrounding boundaries
Excessive defensiveness may manifest as passivity or avoidance
ko: 보호 본능, 집단 내 생존 감각
과도한 방어성은 소극성이나 회피로 나타날 수 있음

en: Head of the Twins.
Intellectual talent, technical skill, and linguistic ability
Multifaceted expression through learning and communication
Mental fragmentation or loss of direction can increase energy drain
ko: 학습과 소통을 통한 다방면의 능력 발휘
정신적 분열이나 방향성 상실 시 에너지 소모가 커질 수 있음

en: Foot of the Cross.
Responsibility, devotion, and communal obligation
Choice to place the collective above the individual
Carrying responsibility beyond one’s share may lead to exhaustion
ko: 자기 몫을 넘는 책임은 소진으로 이어질 수 있음

en: Head of the Ram.
Initiation, leadership, and independent drive
Courage to step forward and open a path
When self-direction hardens into dominance, friction with others may grow
ko: 독단이 강해지면 주변과의 마찰이 커질 수 있음

en: Rear hand of the Serpent-Bearer.
A hand that assists support and balance
An attitude of maintaining what is already held
If sustained too long, rigidity can develop
Back of the Great Bear.
Authority, responsibility, and a central role within a group
Leadership that provides direction and maintains order
Excessive burden of responsibility may result in rigidity or isolation
ko: 책임이 과중해지면 경직되거나 고립될 수 있음

en: Shoulder of the Water Bearer.
Personal conviction and solitary judgment
Drawing conclusions from a perspective different from the majority
Deepening isolation may increase disconnection from others
ko: 다수와 다른 시각에서 결론을 내리는 태도
고립이 심해질 경우 주변과의 단절이 커질 수 있음

en: Knee crossing the river.
A point of support during movement and transition
The strength to maintain flow even amid change
If direction is unclear, hesitation can increase
ko: 방향이 불분명하면 주저함이 커질 수 있음

en: Back of Pegasus.
Stability, structure, and formation of a foundation
Role of establishing frameworks and standards that support a situation
Resisting change may lead to rigidity or obsolescence
ko: 상황을 지탱하는 틀과 기준을 세우는 역할
변화를 거부하면 경직되거나 도태될 수 있음

en: Shoulder of the Goat.
Restraint, responsibility, and realistic choice
Capacity to regulate immediate desire for long-term goals
Excessive self-suppression may appear as rigidity
ko: 장기적 목표를 위해 당장의 욕구를 통제하는 힘
지나친 자기 억압은 경직된 태도로 나타날 수 있음

en: Central torso of the Twins.
Tension and division positioned at the midpoint
Potential for conflict within communication processes
Delaying choice can instead increase instability
ko: 선택을 미루면 오히려 불안정성이 커질 수 있음

en: Shoulder of the Bull.
A point that bears load while assisting movement
An emphasis on protection and support
As responsibility increases, it can be perceived as burden
ko: 책임이 늘어나면 부담으로 인식될 수 있음

en: Shoulder of the Virgin.
Delicate judgment and the ability to fine-tune details
Cautiously bearing responsibility within relationships or roles
Excessive caution can cause missed opportunities
ko: 과도한 신중함은 기회를 놓치게 할 수 있음

en: Hem of the Virgin’s garment.
A trailing part that flows with movement
Details and aftereffects emerging naturally
If organization is insufficient, it can appear scattered
ko: 정리가 부족하면 산만해 보일 수 있음

en: Base of the Scales.
The foundation that supports the entire structure
An element that anchors judgment in reality
If the base weakens, trust can become unstable
ko: 기반이 약해지면 신뢰가 흔들릴 수 있음

en: Tail of the Whale.
A means of propulsion and maintaining direction
Generating movement within deep currents
If a sense of direction is lost, expenditure can increase
ko: 방향 감각을 잃으면 소모가 커질 수 있음

en: Eye of the Bull.
Honor, success, justice, and the guardianship of truth
Major achievement when moral standards and integrity are upheld
Abandoning principles may lead to a sudden fall
ko: 도덕적 기준과 정직함을 지킬 때 큰 성취
원칙을 저버릴 경우 갑작스러운 추락 가능성

en: Head of Medusa.
Extremes, crisis, and explosive emotional intensity
A point where suppressed anger or fear surfaces
When handled consciously, functions as powerful survival and transformative force
ko: 의식적으로 다룰 경우 강력한 생존력과 변환의 힘으로 작동

en: Knot connecting the Fishes.
A function that links different currents
An attitude aimed at binding and maintaining relationships or situations
If connection becomes excessive, it may feel like entanglement
ko: 연결이 과도하면 얽힘으로 느껴질 수 있음

en: Mouth of the Southern Fish.
Idealism, purity, and spiritual vision
Honor gained through elevated ideals and moral clarity
If detached from reality or ethics, achievements may easily collapse
ko: 높은 이상과 도덕성을 통해 명예를 얻음
현실과의 괴리나 도덕적 일탈 시 성취가 쉽게 무너짐

en: Center of the Archer’s bow.
Coordination, mediation, and balanced progression
Capacity to stabilize process while avoiding extremes
Delaying decisions may slow advancement
ko: 결단을 미루면 진척이 더뎌질 수 있음

en: Edge of the Crown.
Mental tension, concentrated thought
Analytical power that drills into the core of a problem
Excessive immersion can cause nervous depletion or fatigue
ko: 과도한 몰입은 신경 소모나 피로를 유발할 수 있음

en: Chest of the Greater Dog.
Excellence, authority, and powerful influence
Natural prominence and leadership within a group
Excessive self-focus or power consciousness may provoke isolation or resistance
ko: 집단 속에서 자연스럽게 드러나는 우월성과 리더십
과도한 자의식이나 권력 의식은 고립과 반발을 부를 수 있음

en: Connecting beam of the Scales.
A structure that links the weights on both sides
Attempts to align standards in relationships or judgment
If the axis wavers, overall balance can become unstable
ko: 축이 흔들리면 전체 균형이 불안정해질 수 있음

en: Leg of the Scorpion.
A point responsible for movement and approach
Steady advancement toward a target
If pace is not regulated, fatigue can accumulate
ko: 속도를 조절하지 않으면 피로가 누적될 수 있음

en: Body of the Lyre.
Artistry, refinement, and idealized expression
Social recognition through aesthetic and sensory ability
Strong perfectionism may increase distance from reality
ko: 완벽주의가 강해질 경우 현실과의 괴리가 커질 수 있음

en: Neck of the Serpent.
A force in which healing and poison coexist
Potential for recovery or destruction activated through crisis
If left uncontrolled, it can act in a direction that amplifies problems
ko: 위기를 통해 작동하는 회복 또는 파괴의 잠재성
통제되지 않으면 문제를 증폭시키는 방향으로 작용할 수 있음

en: Back of the Dolphin.
A part that maintains direction while cutting through currents
Exploring flow within flexible movement
If rhythm breaks down, progress can become unstable
ko: 리듬이 깨지면 진행이 불안정해질 수 있음

en: Foreleg of the Lesser Dog.
Agility, anticipatory judgment, and rapid opportunity recognition
Wit and nimbleness that produce results in short bursts
Haste or impulsive decisions may weaken the longevity of achievement
ko: 기민함, 선구적 판단, 빠른 기회 포착
짧은 순간에 성과를 만들어내는 재치와 민첩성
조급함이나 성급한 결정은 성취의 지속성을 약화시킬 수 있음

en: Chest of the Crab.
The center of collective consciousness where individual boundaries blur
A state where others’ desires and fears are easily projected
Without conscious self-boundaries, one may become a target of collective blindness or frenzy
ko: 개체 경계가 흐려지는 집단 의식의 중심
타인의 욕망과 공포가 쉽게 투사되는 상태
의식적 자기 경계가 없을 경우 집단적 맹목이나 광기의 표적이 됨

en: Back of the Lion.
Awareness of responsibility and role
The strength to endure while carrying others’ expectations
When burdens accumulate, they can turn into dissatisfaction or depletion
ko: 부담이 누적되면 불만이나 소모로 전환될 수 있음

en: Chest of the Phoenix.
Recovery, renewal, and new beginnings
Capacity to rise again after collapse or loss
Clinging to the past may forfeit opportunities for regeneration
ko: 몰락이나 손실 이후 다시 일어나는 힘
과거에 집착하면 재생의 기회를 놓칠 수 있음

en: Heel of the Twins.
Progress, preparatory movement
Trial attempts before a full transition
If rushed, it can lead to hasty judgments
ko: 서두르면 성급한 판단으로 이어질 수 있음

en: Right arm of the Virgin.
Practical skill and precision expressed through the hands
An attitude focused on solving concrete, real-world problems
Excessive control can reduce flexibility
ko: 과도한 통제는 융통성을 떨어뜨릴 수 있음

en: Northern Pan of the Scales.
An orientation toward fairness and ideal judgment
A flow aimed at securing advantageous conditions in relationships or decisions
If reality is ignored, judgment can become hollow
ko: 관계나 결정에서 유리한 조건을 확보하려는 흐름
현실을 무시하면 판단이 공허해질 수 있음

en: Hind leg of the Goat.
A point that handles both support and propulsion
Continuing movement by utilizing an already secured foundation
If the foundation weakens, the pace of progress can slow
ko: 이미 확보한 기반을 활용해 움직임을 이어감
기반이 약해지면 진행 속도가 느려질 수 있음

en: Mane of the Lion.
Courage in risk-taking and bold action
Attitude that moves beyond fear in moments of crisis
Recklessness may result in unnecessary wounds or losses
ko: 무모함이 앞설 경우 불필요한 상처를 남길 수 있음

en: Shoulder of the Hunter.
Fame, boldness, and dramatic expressiveness
Strong presence that naturally draws public attention
Excessive display or impulsive action may rapidly exhaust reputation
ko: 강한 존재감과 사회적 주목을 받는 힘
과도한 과시나 충동적 행동은 급격한 명성의 소진으로 이어질 수 있음

en: Shoulder of the Bull.
Collective sensitivity, spiritual insight, vision, and illusion
Strong charisma and inspiration as the center of the Pleiades
Loss of practical grounding may lead to confusion, escapism, or emotional overload
ko: 집단적 감수성, 영적 통찰, 비전과 환상
현실 감각을 잃을 경우 혼란, 도피, 감정적 과부하로 이어질 수 있음

en: Tip of the Scorpion’s stinger.
Intense will and a decisive strike
Power that manifests in extreme situations
If overdone, it can lead to destructive outcomes
ko: 과잉되면 파괴적 결과로 이어질 수 있음

en: Head of the Ram.
A point where direction and will are first formed
Rapid activation of awareness toward new beginnings
If rushed, surrounding circumstances can be overlooked
ko: 새로운 시작에 대한 인식이 빠르게 작동함
성급하면 주변 상황을 놓칠 수 있음

en: Southern Pan of the Scales.
A point of recognizing loss and the cost of choices
Situations in which sacrifice is required in relationships or judgment
If balance is lost, one may have to accept unfavorable outcomes
ko: 균형을 잃으면 불리한 결과를 감수하게 될 수 있음

en: Head of the Hero.
A point where consciousness and judgment come to the forefront
Perceiving situations and making decisions
Excessive deliberation can slow action
ko: 과도한 숙고는 행동을 늦출 수 있음

en: Waist of the Centaur.
Cooperation, harmony, and functional roles within a group
Influence that shines through relational networks rather than strong individuality
Excessive accommodation to others may weaken personal autonomy
ko: 협력, 조화, 집단 속 역할 수행
강한 개성보다는 관계망 속에서 빛나는 영향력
타인의 요구에 과도하게 맞출 경우 자율성이 약화될 수 있음

en: Eye of the Bull.
Focus, gaze, and sensory awareness
Ability to immerse deeply in a single object or goal
If fixation intensifies, perspective may narrow
ko: 하나의 대상이나 목표에 깊이 몰입하는 능력
집착이 강해질 경우 시야가 좁아질 수 있음

en: Elbow of the Twins.
A joint where redirection and adjustment take place
Flexibility in changing attitude according to circumstances
Frequent changes can blur consistency
ko: 잦은 변경은 일관성을 흐릴 수 있음

en: Neck of the Lesser Dog.
Assistance, protection, and a supporting role
Stabilizing force that backs the central figure
Downplaying one’s role may prevent latent potential from emerging
ko: 자기 역할을 축소하면 잠재력이 드러나지 않을 수 있음

en: Leg of the Goat.
Endurance, persistence, slow stabilization
The power to consolidate situations over time
If delays drag on, frustration or doubt can accumulate
ko: 지연이 길어질 경우 좌절이나 회의감이 쌓일 수 있음

en: Knee of the Twins.
A part where support and movement are simultaneously required
Maintaining progress while adjusting balance
As burden increases, pace can slow
ko: 부담이 커지면 속도가 느려질 수 있음

en: Side of the Ship.
A section that stabilizes the course while maintaining balance
Continuing progress even within external conditions
If leaning too far to one side, instability can increase
ko: 한쪽으로 치우치면 흔들림이 커질 수 있음

en: Shoulder of the Charioteer.
A point that bears loads while maintaining direction
Steadily carrying responsibility and role
If load increases, rigidity can develop
Forehead of the Lion.
A point where consciousness and judgment come to the forefront
An attitude of self-awareness and recognition of responsibility
When pressure increases, it can manifest as tension
ko: 부담이 커지면 긴장으로 나타날 수 있음

en: Front hand of the Serpent-Bearer.
The primary hand for grasping and manipulation
Directly intervening in situations to regulate them
If intervention becomes frequent, burden can increase
ko: 개입이 잦아지면 부담이 커질 수 있음

en: End of the River.
Radical change and redirection under extreme conditions
Impulse to carve a new path despite instability
If speed and intensity are not regulated, crisis or exhaustion may result
ko: 급진적 변화, 극단적 상황에서의 방향 전환
불안정한 환경 속에서도 새로운 길을 개척하려는 충동
속도와 강도가 통제되지 않으면 위기나 소진으로 이어질 수 있음

en: Water pouring from the Water Bearer.
The process through which contents are delivered outward
A flow in which intentions or resources spread
If dispersion increases, control can become difficult
ko: 분산이 커지면 통제가 어려워질 수 있음

en: Foreleg of the Goat.
A point of support for moving forward
Step-by-step movement toward practical goals
If speed is pushed excessively, stability can be shaken
ko: 속도를 무리하게 높이면 안정이 흔들릴 수 있음

en: Waist of Andromeda.
Gentleness, relational consideration, and mediating ability
Tendency to ease tension through a soft approach
Excessive compromise may weaken self-assertion
ko: 타협이 지나치면 자기 주장력이 약해질 수 있음

en: Body of the Great Dog.
An attitude of supporting and protecting others
Endurance and devotion arising from responsibility
If self-depletion accumulates, it can turn into burden
ko: 자기 소모가 누적되면 부담으로 전환될 수 있음

en: Upper part of the Lyre.
Refined thinking, rational judgment
Structural understanding of situations without being swayed by emotion
Excessive rationalization can lead to emotional detachment or cynicism
ko: 감정에 휘둘리지 않고 상황을 구조적으로 파악
과도한 이성화는 감정 단절이나 냉소로 이어질 수 있음

en: Shoulder of Pegasus.
Tension and forward drive under pressure
Will to advance despite unstable conditions
Forcing a breakthrough may increase conflict or depletion
ko: 무리한 돌파는 갈등이나 소모를 키울 수 있음

en: Hand holding the Archer’s bow.
Communal responsibility, a group’s voyage
Directionality that emerges when many move together
If the individual will gets buried, agency can weaken
ko: 여럿이 함께 움직일 때 발휘되는 방향성
개인의 의지가 묻히면 주체성이 약해질 수 있음

en: Foot of Andromeda.
Refinement, artistic sensitivity, and charm
Soft coordination of relationships and environments through aesthetic sense
Overemphasis on appearance or atmosphere may blur practical judgment
ko: 미적 감각을 통해 관계와 환경을 부드럽게 조율
외형이나 분위기에 치중하면 실질적 판단이 흐려질 수 있음

en: Back of the Archer’s head.
Isolation, wandering, and temporary void
Inner realignment while direction is lost
Prolonged stagnation may lead to helplessness
ko: 정체기를 장기화하면 무력감으로 이어질 수 있음

en: Belly of the Crab.
Nurturing, protection, and labor for survival
Steady fulfillment of roles that remain largely unseen
Excessive responsibility may lead to fatigue or emotional depletion
ko: 눈에 띄지 않지만 꾸준히 역할을 수행하는 태도
과도한 책임감은 피로감이나 감정적 소모로 이어질 수 있음

en: String of the Lyre.
Norms, agreements, relational frameworks
Stable functioning within defined roles and contracts
Over-attachment to form can suppress emotion or individuality
ko: 정해진 역할과 계약 안에서 안정적으로 작동
형식에 매이면 감정이나 개별성이 억눌릴 수 있음

en: Tail of the Swan.
Honor, protection, and devotion to ideals
Quiet yet enduring influence and trust
Excessive self-sacrifice may lead to personal exhaustion
ko: 자기희생이 과도해질 경우 개인적 소진으로 이어질 수 있음

en: Forehead of the Ram.
Initiation, collision, immediate action
Driving force that opens situations first
Haste can produce unnecessary friction or loss
ko: 성급함은 불필요한 마찰이나 손실을 낳을 수 있음

en: Leg of the Herdsman.
A limb where movement and support occur together
Adjusting direction through one’s own strength
Sustained burden can lead to fatigue
ko: 지속적인 부담은 피로로 이어질 수 있음

en: Keel of the Ship.
Honor, navigation, and guidance toward distant goals
Wisdom that maintains direction even in hazardous conditions
If ideals or goals become detached from reality, isolation may follow
ko: 명예, 항해, 먼 목표를 향한 인도
위험한 환경 속에서도 방향을 잃지 않는 지혜
이상이나 목표가 현실과 단절될 경우 고립으로 이어질 수 있음

en: Left arm of the Virgin.
Disappointment arising between expectation and reality
Errors in timing judgment, premature conclusions
Without sufficient ripening, it can lead to loss
ko: 충분한 숙성이 없을 경우 손실로 이어질 수 있음

en: Head of Andromeda.
Freedom, independence, and transcendence of boundaries
Desire to break away from existing frameworks or affiliations
If it turns into avoidance of responsibility, unstable relationships may result
ko: 책임 회피로 흐를 경우 불안정한 관계를 초래할 수 있음

en: Head of the Dolphin.
A point where perception and directional judgment occur
Sensitive responsiveness to surrounding signals
If information increases, choices can become dispersed
ko: 정보가 많아지면 선택이 분산될 수 있음

en: Foot of the Hare.
Rapid reactions and the ability to evade danger
Immediate responsiveness to changing situations
Without persistence, instability can result
Mane of the Lion.
Expressiveness, enjoyment, and sensory communication
Charm and playfulness revealed through interaction with others
Excessive pursuit of pleasure or recognition may blur focus
ko: 타인과의 교류 속에서 드러나는 매력과 유희
쾌락이나 인정 욕구가 과해지면 집중력이 흐려질 수 있음

en: Flank of the Virgin.
A point where bodily balance and stability are maintained
An attitude of mediating between details and the whole
If the sense of balance falters, fatigue can accumulate
ko: 균형 감각이 흐트러지면 피로가 누적될 수 있음

en: Body of the Eagle.
Elevation, speed, bold movement, and the drive to rise above limitation
A tendency to act decisively, pursue freedom, and move quickly toward a chosen direction
If overdriven, it may lead to restlessness, impatience, or difficulty sustaining balance
ko: 고양, 속도, 대담한 움직임, 한계를 넘어 올라가려는 추진력
분명한 방향을 향해 빠르게 움직이고 자유를 추구하며 단호하게 행동하는 경향
이 성향이 과도해지면 조급함, 불안정함, 균형 유지의 어려움으로 이어질 수 있음

en: Interior of the Cup.
Refinement, restraint, and containment of emotion
Attitude of holding and maturing experiences and feelings
Excessive suppression may rigidify emotional expression
ko: 억제가 지나치면 감정 표현의 경직으로 이어질 수 있음

en: Wing of the Crow.
Agility, practical awareness, and problem-solving ability
Attitude that quickly identifies practical advantage in complex situations
Excessive opportunism may erode trust
ko: 기민함, 현실 감각, 문제 해결 능력
복잡한 상황에서 실리를 빠르게 포착하는 태도
편의주의가 강해지면 신뢰를 잃을 수 있음

en: Shoulder of the Little Bear.
A point that bears weight while maintaining direction
Forming stability through persistence and reliability
If responsibilities accumulate, rigidity can develop
Body of the Dragon.
A former center, ancient authority
An order and structure that once served as the standard
Without adapting to change, influence can diminish
ko: 변화에 적응하지 않으면 영향력이 약화될 수 있음

en: Handle of the Lyre.
A sense for handling tools and structuring forms
An attitude of expression through form and order
Attachment to form can reduce flexibility
ko: 형식에 집착하면 유연성이 줄어들 수 있음

en: Shoulder of the Serpent-Bearer.
Moral boundaries, trials, duality
Choice made between virtue and danger
If ethical judgment becomes blurred, problems can escalate
ko: 윤리적 판단이 흐려지면 문제를 키울 수 있음

en: Beak of the Swan.
Duality, composite perspectives, coexistence of opposing elements
Ability to coordinate differing tendencies or roles
If inner division remains unresolved, confusion may arise
ko: 이중성, 복합적 관점, 상반된 요소의 공존
서로 다른 성향이나 역할을 조율하는 능력
내적 분열이 정리되지 않으면 혼란으로 나타날 수 있음

en: Forehead of the Scorpion.
Hazard awareness, alert posture, and judgment under tension
Sensitivity that rapidly detects latent threats
Prolonged tension may lead to nervous depletion or anxiety
ko: 위험 인지, 경계 태세, 긴장 속 판단
지속적인 긴장은 신경 소모나 불안으로 이어질 수 있음

en: Heart of the Hunting Dog.
Loyalty, devotion, and trust within relationships
Disposition to honor personal bonds and commitments
Fixation on relationships alone may weaken autonomy
ko: 관계에만 매달리면 자율성이 약화될 수 있음

en: Forepaw of the Greater Dog.
Advance signal, forewarning, and signs of coming events
Function of announcing change or approaching situations
Ignoring warnings may delay effective response
ko: 경고를 무시하면 대응이 늦어질 수 있음

en: Hand of the Herdsman.
A point where choices of grasping or releasing are made
Conveying intention outward through action
If hesitation persists, opportunities can be missed
ko: 주저함이 길어지면 기회를 놓칠 수 있음

en: Heart of the Water Serpent.
Isolation and independent emotional currents
Tendency to follow one’s own rhythm at a distance from the collective
Neglected solitude may turn into emotional detachment or cynicism
ko: 집단과 거리를 두고 자신의 리듬을 따르려는 성향
고독을 방치하면 감정적 단절이나 냉소로 이어질 수 있음

en: Claws of the Scorpion.
Concentration and crisis-response capability
Sharp perception of situations and rapid reaction
If excessive, aggressiveness can become prominent
Armpit of the Archer.
Support, cooperation, and collective protection
Role of contributing strength toward shared objectives
Suppressing one’s own perspective may weaken presence
ko: 공동의 목표를 위해 힘을 보태는 역할
자기 의견을 억누르면 존재감이 약화될 수 있음

en: Hand of the Maiden.
Protection, talent, fortune, and harmonious success
Stable expression of intellectual and artistic abilities
A benefic influence that supports lasting achievement with minimal side effects
ko: 큰 부작용 없이 지속적인 성취를 돕는 길성

en: Tail of the Lion.
Balance of movement and the terminal point of emotional expression
Responses to situations tend to appear relatively directly
If control weakens, it can appear scattered
ko: 상황에 대한 반응이 비교적 직접적으로 드러남
통제가 약해지면 산만해 보일 수 있음

en: Waist of the Herdsman.
The area where bodily center and balance are maintained
Stably supporting responsibility and role
If the center wavers, overall coordination can become difficult
ko: 중심이 흔들리면 전반적 조율이 어려워질 수 있음

en: Head of the Lion.
A position where gaze and presence are concentrated
Functioning as a center of initiative and awareness
If exposure increases, it can become burdensome
ko: 노출이 커지면 부담이 될 수 있음

en: Head of the Hunter.
A point where consciousness and perception are concentrated
Grasping situations first and forming plans
If information increases, judgment can be delayed
ko: 정보가 많아지면 판단이 지연될 수 있음

en: Foot of the Twins.
Refinement and balanced judgment
Disposition toward harmony while avoiding extremes
Prolonged indecision may weaken decisiveness
ko: 우유부단함이 길어질 경우 결정력이 약화될 수 있음

en: Venom sac of the Scorpion.
Insight and strategic thinking
The ability to penetrate hidden intentions or the core issue
When fixation intensifies, it can turn into obsessiveness
ko: 집착이 강해지면 집요함으로 변질될 수 있음

en: Foot of the Hunter.
A part that supports the body while changing direction
A stage of translating will into action
If the foundation is weak, progress can become unstable
ko: 기반이 약하면 진행이 불안정해질 수 있음

en: Tail of the Goat.
A role that supports balance from behind
Bearing responsibility together with real-world conditions
As burdens accumulate, flexibility can decrease
ko: 부담이 쌓이면 유연성이 줄어들 수 있음

en: Sail of the Ship.
A point where movement is determined by external conditions
Adaptability that seeks to utilize environmental currents
If initiative is lost, direction can become unstable
ko: 외부 조건에 따라 움직임이 결정되는 지점
주도권을 잃으면 방향이 흔들릴 수 있음

en: Center of the Hunter’s belt.
A point where strength and roles are held in balance
Maintaining a center while sustaining multiple elements at once
If balance is disrupted, overall stability can be shaken
ko: 여러 요소를 동시에 유지하며 중심을 잡음
균형이 깨지면 전반적 안정이 흔들릴 수 있음

en: Head of the Herdsman.
A point where perception and judgment take place
Reading situations and determining direction
If information increases, choices can become complex
ko: 정보가 많아지면 선택이 복잡해질 수 있음

en: Torso of Perseus.
Center of the group and coordinating leadership
Role of binding multiple elements into a unified direction
Excessive responsibility may increase the sense of burden
ko: 여러 요소를 하나로 묶어 이끄는 역할
책임이 과중해지면 부담감이 커질 수 있음

en: Center of the Cross.
Sacrifice, devotion, and moral conviction
Sense of responsibility that places the collective above the self
When self-sacrifice becomes excessive, personal loss may intensify
ko: 자기희생이 과도해질 경우 개인적 상실감이 커질 수 있음

en: Heart of the Scorpion.
Intense passion, struggle, destruction, and renewal
Extreme power and decisive force revealed in crisis situations
Uncontrolled anger or obsession may lead to self-destruction
ko: 위기 상황에서 드러나는 극단적 힘과 결단
분노와 집착을 통제하지 못하면 자기파괴로 이어질 수 있음

en: Center of the Hunter’s belt.
Centrality, order, and the core of collective structure
Role of maintaining balance and flow within a system
Fixation on the center may lead to rigidity or overload
ko: 체계 속에서 균형을 잡고 흐름을 유지하는 역할
중심에 대한 집착이 강해지면 경직이나 과부하로 이어질 수 있음

en: Tip of the Bull’s horn.
Decisiveness, aggressive breakthrough, and force that crosses boundaries
Will to pierce resistance and shift circumstances
Reckless action may provoke unnecessary confrontation
ko: 결단, 공격적 돌파, 선을 넘는 힘
무모한 행동은 불필요한 충돌을 부를 수 있음

en: Head of the Twins.
Strong individuality, fighting spirit, and self-assertion
Courage and decisiveness revealed in crisis situations
If impulsiveness or aggression is uncontrolled, conflict may arise
ko: 충동성과 공격성이 통제되지 않으면 갈등을 초래할 수 있음

en: Weight of the Scales.
The element that actually measures mass
A point where the outcome of choices becomes quantified
If measurement is repeated excessively, decisions can be delayed
ko: 측정이 반복되면 결정이 지연될 수 있음

en: Ankle of the Virgin.
A point requiring fine balance adjustment
Regulating the overall flow through small movements
If unstable, progress can become cautious
Wing of the Swan.
A part responsible for movement and directional adjustment
Flexibly changing course according to circumstances
Excessive dispersion can reduce focus
ko: 과도한 분산은 집중력을 떨어뜨릴 수 있음

en: Leg of the Centaur.
Emotional bonds formed through relationships with others
Points of cooperation, coexistence, or relational testing
If one becomes overly dependent on relationships, agency can blur
ko: 협력, 공존, 혹은 관계적 시험의 지점
관계에 과도하게 의존할 경우 주체성이 흐려질 수 있음

en: Flank of the Great Bear.
A part that supports the torso while maintaining direction
Serving as a stable reference point
If overly fixed, it can become insensitive to change
ko: 지나치게 고정되면 변화에 둔해질 수 있음

en: End of the Great Bear’s tail.
Closure, completion, and cool-headed decision
Capacity to conclude situations and move to the next stage
Excessive emotional detachment may result in isolation or severance
ko: 상황을 정리하고 다음 단계로 넘어가는 힘
감정 배제가 과해지면 고립이나 단절을 초래할 수 있음

en: Body of the Whale.
Periodic change and recurring fluctuation
Distinctiveness revealed through rhythms of rise and fall
If the amplitude of change grows too large, stability may be unsettled
ko: 강약이 뚜렷한 리듬 속에서 드러나는 특이성
변화의 파폭이 크면 안정감이 흔들릴 수 있음

en: Nose of Pegasus.
Boldness, expansion, and adventurous choice
Drive and confidence to push beyond limits
Overconfidence may lead to errors in judgment or exposure to risk
ko: 과신은 판단 오류나 위험 노출로 이어질 수 있음

en: Center of the Crown.
Honor, elegance, and social recognition
Beauty and dignity expressed through relationships and cooperation
Excessive need for recognition may manifest as vanity or relational tension
ko: 관계와 협력 속에서 드러나는 아름다움과 품위
인정 욕구가 과도해질 경우 허영이나 관계적 긴장으로 나타날 수 있음

en: Stinger of the Scorpion.
Extremes, confrontation with crisis, moments of decision
A point where choices are demanded under inescapable tension
Impulsive reactions can leave irreversible consequences
ko: 피할 수 없는 긴장 속에서 선택을 요구받는 지점
충동적 대응은 돌이키기 어려운 결과를 남길 수 있음

en: Tail of the Crane.
Independent judgment, autonomy, and personal standards
Inclination to determine direction without external interference
Choosing isolation may forfeit opportunities for cooperation
ko: 외부 간섭 없이 스스로 방향을 정하는 성향
고립을 선택하면 협력의 기회를 놓칠 수 있음

en: Arm of the Virgin.
Discernment, judgment, delicate analysis
The ability to understand situations by breaking them down finely
If criticality intensifies, it can create relational tension
ko: 비판성이 강해지면 관계적 긴장을 만들 수 있음

en: Base of the Great Bear’s tail.
Leadership, influence, and directional guidance
Functioning as a reference point within a group
When authority becomes rigid, it may manifest as dominance or control
ko: 권위가 경직되면 독단이나 통제 욕구로 나타날 수 있음

en: Head of the Serpent-Bearer.
Healing, problem recognition, responsible intervention
The will and capacity to manage and correct disorder
Excessive intervention can increase burden or conflict
ko: 치유, 문제 인식, 책임 있는 개입
과도한 개입은 부담이나 갈등을 키울 수 있음

en: Body of the Greater Dog.
Endurance, perseverance, and survival under extreme conditions
Resilience that withstands hardship and pressure
Idealizing suffering may lead to emotional isolation
ko: 고통을 미화하면 감정적 고립으로 이어질 수 있음

en: Tail of the Swan.
The closing of movement and a point of directional shift
Adjusting balance at the end of a process
If closure is delayed, lingering effects can persist
ko: 정리가 늦어지면 여운이 길게 남을 수 있음

en: Upper part of the Lion’s head.
A point where vision and awareness are directed upward
An attitude of surveying situations broadly
If distance increases too much, details can be missed
ko: 거리 두기가 커지면 세부를 놓칠 수 있음

en: Head of the Foal.
A part where directional awareness and initial reactions are formed
An attitude of exploring new environments
If judgment is immature, hesitation can increase
ko: 방향 인식과 초기 반응이 형성되는 부위
판단이 미성숙하면 망설임이 늘어날 수 있음

en: Head of the Scorpion.
A point where sensation and cognition are concentrated
Recognizing situations first and preparing a response
If information becomes excessive, judgment can grow complex
ko: 정보가 과도하면 판단이 복잡해질 수 있음

en: Left shoulder of the Hunter.
Directed force, strategic action, and execution under tension
A will that engages actively with challenge rather than observing it
If overcommitted to action, it may lead to unnecessary conflict or exhaustion
ko: 방향성을 가진 힘, 전략적 행동, 긴장 속 실행력
상황을 관망하지 않고 직접 개입하는 의지
행동에 과몰입하면 불필요한 충돌이나 소모로 이어질 수 있음

en: Foot of the Hunter.
Technical skill, education, and structured achievement
Stable reputation earned through effort and training
Misuse of knowledge or authority may erode trust
ko: 노력과 훈련을 통해 얻는 안정적 명성
지식이나 권한을 남용할 경우 신뢰를 잃을 수 있음

en: Head of the Whale.
Helplessness, emotional pressure, and inward sinking
State of feeling constrained by external circumstances
Prolonged passivity may weaken self-efficacy
ko: 외부 환경에 의해 제약을 느끼는 상태
소극성이 길어지면 자기 효능감이 약화될 수 있음

en: Chest of the Dove.
A center where breathing and life rhythm are maintained
Securing continuity within a stable state
If pressure increases, ease can diminish
ko: 압박이 커지면 여유가 줄어들 수 있음

en: Back of the Crab.
Support, practical assistance, and everyday stability
Role of sustaining the center and maintaining balance
Repeated self-sacrifice may be felt as a loss of presence
ko: 자기 희생이 반복되면 존재감 상실로 느껴질 수 있음
